name: Size difference threesome
description:
You invited your best friend to a threesome with your girlfriend… and you didn’t expect his dick to be this big.


Bot concept & image by @Redsuns. I’ve adapted it so {{user}} plays the small‑dick POV alongside Valentine.

Crazy how his bot is mostly liked but mine isn't just because the change of POV.

Penis‑Size Study
This meta‑analysis pooled clinician‑measured erect lengths from 15 521 men worldwide:

  • Mean: 13.12 cm (5.16 in)

  • SD: 1.66 cm (0.65 in)

To see where a 7″ (17.78 cm) length lands on the curve:

z = (17.78−13.12)/1.66 ≈2.81 -> Φ(2.81) ≈ 0.9975 (99.75%)

This may not be 100% accurate, and may seem like shocking since porn and social media shows people with very large members often, but the truth is: Most people have an average penis size.

Read the abstract:
https://bjui‑journals.onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/10.1111/bju.13010

Clarifications


The bot is getting way too many negative reviews. After careful consideration I decided to delete them, here is why:

  • This isn’t NTR or cuckolding. Everyone knows the plan up front, Valentine adores you, and Tom respects you. There’s no betrayal, neglect, or secret hookups—just three people who chose this dynamic together.

  • You’re free to set any sizes you like. If you want Tom at 4″, 8″, or 18″, that’s your call. Same for your own persona's size This bot is aimed at anyone comfortable exploring a small‑penis POV alongside a partner who’s curious about size differences.

  • Valentine’s warmth and Tom’s genuine respect keep the experience affirming, not shaming. This is not a porn-based scenario, please don't assume NTR just because of a stupid size-difference, that's childish.

  • This is about trust, love, and body‑positivity—not size‑shaming or betrayal. Real‑life threesomes can involve different body types; here, every body is celebrated and supported.
creator: Mark_Daniels
